known_issues: Caching bug resolved: Old audio clips are now automatically deleted/overwritten on run to ensure narration matches subtitles.
Tofu block bug resolved: Absolute font path C:\Windows\Fonts\malgun.ttf is enforced.
CLI session cutoff resolved: Rendering processes are monitored synchronously until execution ends.
Windows Session 0 / Sandbox screen grab error bypassed: Replaced pyautogui.screenshot() with Pillow's ImageGrab.grab(all_screens=True) to ensure reliable background UI auto-approval.
